question: Did Pfizer grow its PPNE between FY20 and FY21?
gold_answer: Yes, change in PPNE was positive year over year
predicted: Yes, Pfizer grew its Property, Plant and Equipment (PP&E) between FY20 and FY21. PP&E increased from $13,745 million in 2020 to $14,882 million in 2021, representing an increase of $1,137 million or approximately 8.3%. This growth was driven by increases in machinery and equipment (from $11,000 million to $12,252 million) and construction in progress (from $3,481 million to $3,822 million), partially offset by decreases in land and furniture/fixtures.
reasoning: I have the balance sheet data showing PP&E for both years. From the Consolidated Balance Sheets on page 59, Property, plant and equipment was $14,882 million in 2021 and $13,745 million in 2020. This shows an increase of $1,137 million, or about 8.3%. The detailed breakdown in Note 9 on page 88 confirms these same figures.
label: AL
